import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { Button } from '../components/ui/button'; import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '../components/ui/card'; import { Input } from '../components/ui/input'; import { Shield, Eye, EyeOff, ArrowLeft, UserPlus, CheckCircle } from 'lucide-react'; const Register = () => { const [showPassword, setShowPassword] = useState(false); const [showConfirmPassword, setShowConfirmPassword] = useState(false); const [formData, setFormData] = useState({ firstName: '', lastName: '', email: '', password: '', confirmPassword: '' }); const handleSubmit = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); // Handle registration logic here console.log('Registration attempt:', formData); }; const handleChange = (e) => { setFormData({ ...formData, [e.target.name]: e.target.value }); }; return (
